title: Academic Paper Scraper - Input
description: Search and retrieve academic papers from Semantic Scholar (226M+ papers), arXiv, and more. Supports keyword search, paper lookup by DOI/arXiv ID/PMID, and citation graph traversal. API-based -- no browser needed, no bot detection issues.

mode.sectionDescription: Choose how to find papers. 'search' finds papers by keywords, 'get_paper' looks up a specific paper by ID, 'citations' retrieves papers that cite or are cited by a given paper.
mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Operation mode: 'search' for keyword search, 'get_paper' for lookup by ID, 'citations' for citation graph traversal.

query.sectionDescription: Provide a search query (for 'search' mode) or a paper identifier (for 'get_paper' and 'citations' modes).
query.title: Search query or Paper ID
query.description: For 'search': keywords like 'transformer attention mechanism'. For 'get_paper'/'citations': a paper ID -- DOI (10.1234/...), arXiv ID (2301.12345), PubMed ID (PMID:12345678), or Semantic Scholar ID (a1b2c3...).

source.title: Source
source.description: Data source for search. 'semantic_scholar' searches 226M+ papers across all fields. 'arxiv' searches arXiv preprints (best for physics, CS, math). 'auto' uses Semantic Scholar for general queries and arXiv for category-specific searches.

citationDirection.title: Citation direction
citationDirection.description: For 'citations' mode only. 'citing' returns papers that cite the target. 'cited_by' returns papers the target references.

yearFrom.sectionDescription: Narrow results by publication year, fields of study, or open access availability.
yearFrom.title: Year from
yearFrom.description: Filter papers published on or after this year (e.g. 2020).

yearTo.title: Year to
yearTo.description: Filter papers published on or before this year (e.g. 2025).

fieldsOfStudy.title: Fields of study
fieldsOfStudy.description: Filter by academic field (Semantic Scholar only). Examples: 'Computer Science', 'Medicine', 'Physics', 'Biology', 'Mathematics', 'Chemistry', 'Engineering'.

openAccessOnly.title: Open access only
openAccessOnly.description: Only return papers with free full-text PDF available.

arxivCategories.title: arXiv categories
arxivCategories.description: Filter by arXiv category (arXiv source only). Examples: 'cs.AI', 'cs.LG', 'physics.hep-th', 'math.AG', 'q-bio.NC'. See https://arxiv.org/category_taxonomy for full list.

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control how many results are returned.
maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of papers to return (1-500). Free users are limited to 25 per run.

includeAbstract.title: Include abstracts
includeAbstract.description: Include full paper abstracts in output.

includeTldr.title: Include AI summary (TLDR)
includeTldr.description: Include AI-generated one-sentence summary (Semantic Scholar only, available for ~40% of papers).

includeCitationCounts.title: Include citation counts
includeCitationCounts.description: Include citation and reference counts for each paper.

sortBy.title: Sort by
sortBy.description: Sort results by relevance or recency.

requestIntervalSecs.title: Request interval (seconds)
requestIntervalSecs.description: Minimum seconds between API requests. Semantic Scholar allows 1 req/sec without API key. arXiv recommends 3s between requests.
